name: com.memxus/memxus
title: Memxus — AI Context Engine
description: AI context engine for developers: GitHub, Notion, memory unified for Claude, Cursor, and ChatGPT.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.extendedDescription: The AI context engine for developers. Automatically builds persistent context from your GitHub repos, Notion docs, commits, PRs, and decisions — then delivers it to Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT, Gemini, and any AI tool you use. Not a memory tool. A context engine that reads your real work and activates the right official AI skills for your stack. Cross-platform, encrypted, portable.

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Save context to persistent memory — from GitHub commits, Notion pages, or manual input. Visibility can be private or shared with groups. Returns memory ID and confirmation.

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Retrieve context from memory using semantic search. Searches across private memories and shared group memories. GitHub/Notion synced content available via project collections.

tools.name: get_context
tools.description: Build a formatted context block for the current topic — ideal for injecting relevant memory from GitHub, Notion, and saved decisions into agent prompts. If the user's first message appears to be a coding task, technical question, or project-related request, call get_context with the detected topic BEFORE responding.

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: List your memories with filtering by visibility, type, collection, or group. Useful for auditing what's saved and managing your context.

tools.name: get_memory
tools.description: Retrieve a single memory by ID. Returns full content, metadata, and source.

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List your memory collections (projects, scopes). Shows where context is organized — GitHub/Notion syncs appear under project:<slug>.

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Delete a memory permanently. Useful for removing outdated or incorrect context.

tools.name: memory_stats
tools.description: Show statistics about stored memories by type and collection — audit your context footprint.

tools.name: update
tools.description: Update existing memory content, tags, visibility, or type. Useful for refining saved context as your project evolves.

tools.name: connect_source
tools.description: Connect GitHub or Notion from chat. Returns auth URL and poll token to sync repos, commits, PRs, and Notion docs into project context.

tools.name: list_syncable_items
tools.description: List syncable GitHub repositories or Notion pages after connecting a source. Select items to build project context.

tools.name: set_sync_selection
tools.description: Save which repos or Notion pages to sync, then trigger initial sync into project:<slug> collections.

tools.name: check_connect_status
tools.description: Poll GitHub or Notion connection status after connect_source. Confirms when source context is ready.

tools.name: get_context_with_skills
tools.description: Build complete project context + suggest official AI skills matched to your stack. Analyzes project profile (GitHub, Notion, stack) and suggests verified skills to activate. Intent-aware: provide current task for better recommendations.

tools.name: suggest_skills
tools.description: Discover official Agent Skills for a topic via skills.sh without building a full context block. Matches skills to your stack and current task.

screenshots.description: Memxus — AI Context Engine: persistent context from GitHub, Notion, and memory for any AI tool
